raw.message: 最大でガチャ1,000連分相当のアイテムがもらえる！強力な城娘をゲットしよう

hook.summary: Golden sliding doors open to reveal a game event announcement.
hook.visual_action: The ad starts with a logo on a golden background, followed by traditional Japanese sliding doors opening with a bright light effect.
hook.text_overlay: 御城プロジェクト:RE CASTLE DEFENSE, 招城祭 復刻開催!!, 2026年3月10日~4月13日 メンテナンスまで

scene_flow: Intro with game logo on a golden patterned background.
Sliding doors open to reveal a reprint event announcement with specific dates.
Promotion of a 1,000-item reward alongside character artwork.
Rapid montage showcasing various anime-style female characters (Castle Girls).
Final splash screen detailing login rewards and the game title.
on_screen_text: 御城プロジェクト:RE CASTLE DEFENSE
2026年3月10日~4月13日 メンテナンスまで
最大ガチャ 1,000連分相当のアイテムがもらえる!
可憐で強力な城娘を獲得できる
期間中のログインで最高レアの異伝城娘が1体もらえる!
audience_proxy: Fans of anime-style gacha games and tower defense who enjoy collecting moe-personified historical castle characters.
